/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libcoarse_trajectory_generator.a CMakeFiles/coarse_trajectory_generator.dir/grid_search.cc.o CMakeFiles/coarse_trajectory_generator.dir/hybrid_a_star.cc.o CMakeFiles/coarse_trajectory_generator.dir/node3d.cc.o CMakeFiles/coarse_trajectory_generator.dir/reeds_shepp_path.cc.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libcoarse_trajectory_generator.a
